name: The Hog Penny Pub & Restaurant
description: Hamilton's oldest pub, a Bermuda institution since 1956. Traditional British pub fare — fish and chips, shepherd's pie, Bermuda fish chowder — in a wood-panelled room off Burnaby Street. Popular with locals and visitors alike. Expect wait times on weekends. Good selection of draft beers. Prices are mid-range by Bermuda standards.
